query:
UPDATE agent_sdk_turn_attempts
SET
    task_id = $2,
    attempt_number = $3,
    provider = $4,
    requested_model = $5,
    request_blob = $6,
    response_blob = $7,
    response_id = $8,
    response_model = $9,
    stop_reason = $10,
    outcome = $11,
    input_tokens = $12,
    output_tokens = $13,
    cached_input_tokens = $14,
    opened_at = $15,
    closed_at = $16,
    duration_ms = $17,
    otel_trace_id = $18,
    otel_span_id = $19
WHERE id = $1
